The article discusses prompt engineering as a creative skill for AI art. It mentions studies on discerning prompt quality, writing prompts, and refining prompts. The abstract does not expose any identifiable prompt structure or procedure. It only says they studied if people can evaluate, write, and refine prompts. No specific method is given. So not_reported.
